examples.title: Pseudocode: Collection Interface
examples.description: Demonstrates the basic operations of the Collection interface
examples.code:
INTERFACE Collection
BEGIN
 PROCEDURE add(element)
 PROCEDURE remove(element)
 PROCEDURE contains(element)
 PROCEDURE size()
 PROCEDURE isEmpty()
END
examples.explanation: This pseudocode defines the basic operations of the Collection interface, including adding, removing, and checking for elements, as well as checking the size and emptiness of the collection.

examples.title: Java: Collection Interface
examples.description: Demonstrates the implementation of the Collection interface in Java
examples.explanation: This Java code defines the Collection interface, which extends the Iterable interface and includes methods for adding, removing, and checking for elements, as well as checking the size and emptiness of the collection.

examples.title: Java: ArrayList Implementation
examples.description: Demonstrates the implementation of the ArrayList class in Java
examples.explanation: This Java code defines the ArrayList class, which extends the AbstractList class and implements the List interface. It includes methods for adding and retrieving elements, as well as other list operations.
